name: @forgeax/parity-urp-vs-hdrp
description: URP vs HDRP pixel-parity fixture (feat-20260608-cluster-lighting M7 / w26). Renders the SAME scene (≤4 PointLight) twice -- left canvas via URP (default), right canvas via HDRP (installPipeline) -- and exposes window.__captureLeft / __captureRight for scripts/bench/pixel-parity.mjs. AC-22: ε ≤ 0.001 ≤4 lights subset.

bundle-size.reason: fixture-only bundle; size variance is downstream of @forgeax/engine-runtime + @forgeax/engine-rhi-webgpu already tracked at the package level

fps.reason: static-frame fixture (one renderer.draw per capture, no rAF loop). FPS measurement is hello-cube / hello-room territory

gate.reason: no package-level binary gate; AC-22 ε ≤ 0.001 enforced via scripts/bench/pixel-parity.mjs urp-vs-hdrp target

spike-report.reason: not a spike app; this is the M7 hdrp parity fixture
